routing_rationale: Ticket is about a withdrawal issue and mentions funds being blocked, so it should be routed to General Support and Payments queues.
Ticket is about login access and has a high urgency, so it should be routed to General Support queue.
Ticket is about verification and has a low urgency, so it should be routed to General Support queue.
Ticket is about product behavior, so it should be routed to Product queue.
Ticket is about a privacy request and requires specialist handling, so it should be routed to Privacy queue.
Ticket is about a deposit issue and mentions funds being blocked, so it should be routed to General Support and Payments queues.
Ticket is about an account restriction, mentions a regulator or legal threat, and requires specialist handling, so it should be routed to Compliance and Risk queues.
Ticket is about a statement export, so it should be routed to General Support queue.
Ticket is about a deposit issue, so it should be routed to General Support and Payments queues.
Ticket is about verification, so it should be routed to General Support queue.
Ticket is about an account restriction and requires specialist handling, so it should be routed to Risk queue.
Ticket is about API support, so it should be routed to Developer Support queue.
